KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_FitCrispBalancedBar_Descriptio: Expertly designed to provide a balanced boost, this bar is an ideal on-the-go snack that delivers both flavor and sustenance.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_JellyBabies_Description: Unleash the untamed flavors of exotic fruit! These candies are a roaring fusion of intense fruit sensations, daring your taste buds to embrace the wild side of snacking.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_TrailMix_Description: Embark on a journey of nutty indulgence with DiZ Mixed Nuts, a curated blend of nature's finest offerings! This assortment captures the essence of diverse nuts, from the rich creaminess of cashews to the robust crunch of almonds, each bite a symphony of textures and flavors.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_MRE_Description: The Combat Ration Pack is a comprehensive field ration designed to provide sustenance and nutrition in demanding environments. It contains a main course, side dish, dessert, crackers, spread, beverage mix, flameless ration heater, and other accessories, all packaged in a durable and portable format. Hope you get the Chili Mac!
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_ThaiMRE_Description: A specialized field ration crafted to meet the dietary and nutritional requirements of military personnel in active service. Designed by culinary experts, each Combat Meal includes a balanced assortment of dishes, condiments, and beverages, all encapsulated in a durable and portable package.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_SilkenTofu_Description: Made from the purest organic soybeans, this tofu offers a velvety texture, perfect for a wide range of culinary creations.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_PickledBambooShoots_Descriptio: Don't be a sad panda, and discover the subtle, earthy goodness of these tender bamboo strips.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_PremiumPorkLuncheonMeat_Descri: Indulge in the exquisite taste of our Premium Pork Luncheon Meat – a culinary delight crafted from the finest, succulent pork. May contain trace amounts of milk, nuts, shellfish, and asbestos.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_GIBeefJerkyOriginal_Descriptio: Made from premium cuts of beef and seasoned with a secret blend of spices, each tender strip of jerky delivers a burst of bold flavor. Whether you're on a mission or just seeking a protein-packed snack, this jerky has it all!
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_ClifBar_Description: Transport yourself to a realm of indulgence, as rich chocolate envelops your senses while the cookie's delicate texture offers a satisfying crunch with every bite.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_CuredPorkLiverPate_Description: This spreadable delight is a testament to culinary craftsmanship, offering a luxurious blend that's both savory and satisfying. Now with 5% real pork!
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_FreezeDriedFoodCivilianPackage: This freeze-dried meal combines tender beef, zesty chili spices, and the satisfying texture of macaroni. With the addition of high-quality beans, each bite offers a medley of flavors and nutrients that will fuel your culinary exploration.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_FreezeDriedFoodMilitaryPackage: This freeze-dried meal combines tender beef, zesty chili spices, and the satisfying texture of macaroni. With the addition of high-quality beans, each bite offers a medley of flavors and nutrients that will fuel your culinary exploration. Now in a compact packaging made for military use!
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_Spam_Description: Crafted for those who demand bold flavor, this premium lunch meat embodies the perfect balance of rich texture and authentic taste. Whether stacked in a sandwich or savored on its own, Sinngua Lunch Meat elevates your mealtime with its mouthwatering presence. No animals were harmed in the making of this product.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_FreezeDriedFoodMilitaryPackage: Adventure Chili Mac With Beef Pouch
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_KitKatBar_Description: Experience an absolute chocolatey bliss with this delectable snack, where smooth, rich chocolate embraces a delicate, crispy wafer interior.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_TivoliChocolateWafers_Descript: Delicately layered with luscious chocolate, these exquisite crispy wafers will have you yearning for more after every delicious crunch. Kasem Chocolate wafers are a registered trademark of the Kasem styrofoam company.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_DoubleCoatChocolateBar_Descrip: This exclusive candy bar offers double the amount of rich cocoa, providing a satisfying chocolate experience with each bite.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_DarkMilkChocolateBar_Descripti: A symphony of silky chocolate and crispy almonds, carefully crafted to provide a delightful combination of tastes and textures, perfect for your sweet cravings.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_LycheeInSyrup_Description: Sweet lychee fruits preserved in a simple, syrupy solution, offering a taste of tropical goodness in every bite.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_CannedTunaChunks_Description: Dive into a world of ocean-inspired flavors with these exquisite tuna chunks, gently packed in natural coconut water. A unique combination that offers a fresh, wholesome taste. Now with even less mercury!
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_BakedBeans_Description: Savor the zesty kick of these hearty baked beans, simmered in a tangy and spicy tomato sauce. A taste of the Wild West that adds a fiery twist to your meal.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_SabaFishInTeriakySauce_Descrip: Tender mackerel fillets bathed in a delicious teriyaki sauce, presenting a harmonious blend of sweet and savory flavors.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_HdrMeal_Description: Humanitarian Daily Ration. A ration pack designed to provide essential daily sustenance to individuals in need, offering a balanced selection of nourishing food items to support their well-being.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Food_OneShotEnergyChews_Description: An ultra-compact energy boost for extended operations. Each chew delivers 75 mg of caffeine and essential nootropics. Lychee Splash flavor.
